summary.ceiling_note: 4000-file ceiling matches IDE guard walk; totals match guard when unchanged.
summary.compare_with_guard_report: data/reports/z_ide_commflow_guard.json → scan.mismatch_count should equal route_mismatch_total here.

thematic_clusters_by_bucket.note: Separate app tree under hub root; router uses first segment only.
Dashboard .vscode/json, archive, apps outliers — finer split is in aggregates.
.mjs allow-list is scripts|tools — npm workspaces still place .mjs in packages/ (@z-sanctuary/zuno-transformation-slice)
JSON mirrors (e.g. registry copies) under docs/ vs data/config allow-list
docs/public and similar assets — css/js/html routed to interface/dashboard in guard
ethics/ top-level charters vs clustered docs router
Cloudflare/deploy helpers may use ts/tsx outside ROUTING defaults

recommended_safe_batches.title: Align ROUTING `.mjs` with npm workspace reality
recommended_safe_batches.nature: ~12 files: rule allows scripts|tools only; packages/ holds workspace slices.
minimal_safe_options: Policy: extend allowedTop with `packages` for .mjs (review impact).
Policy: exempt `packages/*/…` from guard (narrow glob in future guard PR).
Do nothing — keep advisory amber (recommended until layout project).

recommended_safe_batches.title: docs/public and documentation-adjacent static assets
recommended_safe_batches.nature: Approx 2 css/js/html + 7 json under docs/ (see clusters).
minimal_safe_options: Extend .css docs top (narrow) vs move assets to docs-approved structure.
Exempt docs/public/** selectively after human review.

recommended_safe_batches.title: ethics/, ethics-adjacent, and miscellaneous pairs
minimal_safe_options: Add ethics to EXEMPT_TOPS or relocate under docs/ethics*.

recommended_safe_batches.title: Embedded Amk/Lottery project folder
recommended_safe_batches.nature: Large subtree with own layout — first-segment rule flags many extensions.
minimal_safe_options: EXEMPT first segment folder when operator accepts (careful breadth).

recommended_safe_batches.title: deploy/ edge bundles
recommended_safe_batches.nature: Deploy scaffolding outside apps|packages ts router.
minimal_safe_options: Path-scoped exemptions or widen ts allow tops for deploy/**/*.

recommended_safe_batches.title: Residual thematic bucket (mixed pairs)
recommended_safe_batches.nature: Other extension×top combos — triage via pair table before policy change.
minimal_safe_options: No bulk move until buckets A–F addressed; revisit pair histogram.

interpretation: Roughly 88% of mismatches (~1224 paths) fall under **Amk_Goku Worldwide Loterry/** as first segment — sibling/nested-project tree scanned under hub root, not "core hub" drift.
Mismatches are **not necessarily bugs** — the guard applies: *(extension × first path segment ∈ ROUTING allow-list)*.
Residual **G_misc** often pairs like `.json|dashboard` (nested `.vscode/` under dashboard) versus allow-list concentrating json under data|.vscode.
ide_commflow_guard remains advisory; this report **does not** change comm-flow verifier output or governance JSON.
Eco-system comm-flow **amber for IDE guard** stays until guard policy adjusts or paths narrow — diagnosis is read-only signal.
